tests.name: game_loads
tests.observation: CC3 engine v3.8.8 loads successfully. Page title is 'Cocos Creator - game-client'. WebGL canvas (1920x1280) is present and rendering at 60 FPS with 180 triangles drawn per frame. Scene 'Prototype' and 'GameScene' both load via director.loadScene(). Engine init completes in ~25ms. Note: Playwright cannot capture WebGL canvas content in screenshots (canvas appears black), but the CC3 runtime confirmed via JS evaluation that the engine is fully operational.

tests.name: ui_elements_visible
tests.observation: PrototypeBoard bootstraps an 8x8 tile grid (64 tiles) with UITransform+Graphics+UIOpacity per tile. Bootstrap HUD creates ComboLabel, ClearedLabel, StepsLabel, and Reset button programmatically. However, HUD labels showed 'no label' because the PrototypeBoard was added programmatically (not from scene file) and the _bootstrapHUD did not attach labels to the component refs before tiles were matched. GameScene also has a bootstrap HUD with 'MovesLabel' (showing '-- moves'), 'ObjectiveLabel' ('0 / --'), 'ComboLabel', and a Pause button. The GameController node failed to load from the scene file due to 'getComponent: Type must be non-nil' errors (2 occurrences), meaning the full GameScene HUD is not active from scene file load.

tests.name: tile_interaction
tests.observation: Tile matching verified via JS evaluation on the live CC3 runtime. Test 1: Tapped tile (row:0,col:0, type:2) -> selection registered (selected={x:0,y:0}). Tapped matching tile (row:0,col:7, type:2) -> match executed: cleared went 0->2, combo went 0->1, both cells set to null in grid. BFS path validated by engine. Test 2 (combo): Forced lastMatchTime within COMBO_WINDOW_MS=2000ms, matched tiles (row:0,col:0, type:1) and (row:0,col:3, type:1) -> combo incremented 1->2, cleared went 2->4. Tile vanish animation (UIOpacity tween) and gravity/drop-columns logic confirmed as active code paths.

tests.name: no_js_errors
tests.observation: 2 JS errors found: 'getComponent: Type must be non-nil' (×2) at bundled/index.js:169919. These occur during Prototype.scene and GameScene.scene deserialization when the CC3 deserializer attempts to wire the @property(Label) decorators on PrototypeBoard (comboLabel, clearedLabel). The Label type resolves to undefined in cc.UITransform's namespace at deserialization time, causing the Board node to fail initialization from the scene file. The PrototypeBoard works correctly when instantiated programmatically with cc.UITransformComponent. The GameController node in GameScene also fails to load from the scene file.

tests.name: page_metadata
tests.observation: Page title is 'Cocos Creator - game-client' — properly branded for the game-client project, not a generic 'index.html'. URL is http://localhost:7456/. WebGL canvas element detected (1 canvas, 1920x1280 pixels).
